description: CompositionEcru blazer jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with a four button mock cuff, buttoned front placket, two patch pockets on the front with flap closures, stitch detailing and a slit at the back Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash or machine wash inside out separately with warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations This jacket coat from basics is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and suede shoes, or wear unbuttoned with a monochrome shirt and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
